panels.title: Oldest XID Age
panels.description: Transaction-ID age. The exporter metric suffix is misleading: this is not wall-clock seconds.

panels.title: Index Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: Index accesses served from shared buffers.

panels.title: Top Indexes by Physical Reads
panels.description: Physical reads in the selected range.

panels.title: Top Indexes by Buffer Hits
panels.description: Buffer hits in the selected range.

panels.title: Dead Tuple Ratio
panels.description: Dead tuples as percent of all tuples.

panels.title: Active Autovacuum Workers
panels.description: May show no data when no worker is active.

panels.title: Vacuum in Progress
panels.description: May show no data when no VACUUM is running.

panels.title: Waiting Locks
panels.description: May show no data if the exporter build has no granted label.
